pageContext.name: Nezuko Kamado Reprint Version (Tengen Uzui Is Here!)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai Spirits Ichibansho are proud to announce the newest release, Nezuko Kamado Reprint Version (Tengen Uzui Is Here!) Collectible Figure!  This anime figure is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Nezuko Kamado from the respected anime, Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. Standing at approximately 3.9' tall, Nezuko Kamado is seen in her popular pose.  Be sure to collect this Nezuko Kamado Collectible Figure and enhance your Demon Slayer display with other incredible Ichibansho figures!
